div.div:
Shows actual interactions and tooltips, preferably taking place near border and over phone.
Easier to embed in docs and env with no tooltip or windows support

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 184px; height: 1px; padding-top: 269px; margin-left: 760px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

div.div:
Desktop controls - title, close, minimize, maximize:
- macOS - must match the OS
- windows - can use custom rendering
Functionality not related to desktop window management must be provided in borwser mode - either move to sidebar or keep the title interactions.
